mission_statement: A fast and user-friendly assistant where you can manage your class schedules and easily organize your academic materials all in one place. With MyPrograms, combine all your course flow and documents into a single smart timeline.
download_desc: Since MyPrograms is not yet on app stores, you can safely download the latest version directly from GitHub.
install_guide_text:
1. Click the download button and select the file ending in release.apk under the 'Assets' section on the page.
2. If you see an 'Install apps from unknown sources' warning, select 'Allow'.
3. Once the installation is finished, your app is ready to use.
kao_info_text: The restrictive policies imposed on independent developers by tech giants do more than just stifle innovation; they also limit your freedom as users to use the apps you want, however you want. This situation leads many independent apps you love to eventually disappear or become trapped within systems beyond your control. To ensure MyPrograms remains forever free, ad-free, and entirely under your control, I stand against these unfair limitations and advocate for Android to remain an open platform.
vision_text: MyPrograms aims to bridge the gap between complex calendar applications and simple note-taking tools. Our core philosophy is that technology should be an enabler, not a barrier, when managing your academic life. While prioritizing keeping your data under your control (on your device), we aim to offer both freedom and security with upcoming cloud synchronization features. MyPrograms is an open-source project that continuously evolves to help students at all levels elevate their study discipline with a digital assistant.
card_privacy_desc: Review our privacy policy to learn how your personal data is processed.
card_term_of_use_desc: Review the terms of use to learn about your rights and responsibilities.
card_about_desc: Explore detailed information about the purpose and features of the app.
card_suggestion_desc: Found an issue or have a suggestion? Contact us.
support_project_text: MyPrograms is a personal project developed for students and is 100% free and ad-free. I’m building this app step by step, writing one line of code at a time to make our academic lives easier.
support_project_sub_text: If MyPrograms has helped make your life easier, you can learn more about my story and support its development.
